title: Australian-Style Lamb Roast
description: A hearty lamb roast with a sweet and tangy glaze, inspired by traditional Australian cuisine.
instructions: Season the lamb shoulder with salt and black pepper.
In a small bowl, mix together the honey, lemon juice, and minced garlic.
Rub the honey-lemon mixture all over the lamb shoulder, making sure to coat it evenly.
Place the lamb shoulder in a large Dutch oven or a heavy roasting pan.
Add the rosemary sprigs and olive oil to the pan.
Cover the pan with a lid or foil and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Roast the lamb for 2 1/2 hours, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C).
Remove the lamb from the oven and let it rest for 10-15 minutes before slicing and serving.
